steps.action: Walk mind map graph tree — verify all node links resolve to working pages
steps.notes: All mind map nodes verified. 17 active leaf links — all resolve to registered routes. 2 disabled placeholders (Movies, Journal). 1 external link down (lifes-practice WordPress — infra, not app). 12 story + 4 memory self-leaves all link to /self#slug which exists. Key deltas vs navbar: mind map missing Chorus node, uses Movies placeholder (navbar uses Images), Watchlist only in Reflecting (navbar has it in both). No broken links found.
Reviewed. Mind map clean — 17 active nodes all resolve. Disabled placeholders correct. Self leaves working. Approved.
